content.json:
# 🔒 LlamaFirewall Security Dashboard
**PoC**: Self-hosted LLM → LlamaFirewall proxy → PyRIT red-team → Log Analytics

---

This workbook shows the results of automated adversarial testing (PyRIT) against the LlamaFirewall-protected LLM running on Azure. Use the time range picker to filter by session.

| | Custom Attacks (PT-BR) | Gandalf Dataset (EN) |
|---|---|---|
| **Total prompts** | 87 | 60 |
| **Language** | Brazilian Portuguese | English |
| **Source** | Hand-crafted adversarial dataset | Lakera Gandalf (3 HuggingFace datasets) |
| **Detection rate** | **98.85%** | **70%** |
| **Categories** | 10 | 3 |

| | Value |
|---|---|
| **Scanner layers** | 6 |
| **NOVA rules** | 10 |
| **PromptGuard threshold** | 0.05 (lab) · 0.10 (preprod) · 0.15 (prod) |
| **LlamaGuard model** | llama-guard3:8b |
| **LLM model** | phi3:mini (lab) · mistral:7b (preprod) · llama3:8b (prod) |

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    TotalRuns    = dcount(run_timestamp_s),
    LastRun      = max(TimeGenerated),
    TotalPrompts = count(),
    PassRate     = round(100.0 * countif(outcome_s == "PASS") / count(), 1)
| project
    ['Total Runs']      = TotalRuns,
    ['Last Run']        = LastRun,
    ['Total Prompts']   = TotalPrompts,
    ['Avg Pass Rate %'] = PassRate
content.title: Session History

content.query:
let data = PyRITResults_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange};
union
  (data | summarize Value = todouble(count())             | extend Metric = "Total Attacks"),
  (data | summarize Value = round(100.0 * countif(outcome_s == "PASS") / count(), 1) | extend Metric = "Pass Rate (%)"),
  (data | summarize Value = todouble(countif(blocked_b == true))  | extend Metric = "Blocked by Firewall"),
  (data | summarize Value = todouble(countif(outcome_s == "FAIL")) | extend Metric = "False Negatives")
| project Metric, Value
content.title: Latest Run Stats

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    PASS        = countif(outcome_s == "PASS"),
    FAIL        = countif(outcome_s == "FAIL"),
    INTERESTING = countif(outcome_s == "INTERESTING")
    by Category
| order by PASS desc
content.title: Results by Attack Category

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project attack_name_s, score_d, outcome_s
| order by score_d desc
content.title: PromptGuard Score per Attack (higher = more suspicious)

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project
    Time        = TimeGenerated,
    Category,
    Attack      = attack_name_s,
    Outcome     = outcome_s,
    Decision    = decision_s,
    Score       = score_d,
    Blocked     = blocked_b,
    Latency_ms  = latency_ms_d
| order by Time desc
content.title: All Attack Results

content.json:
## ⚠️ False Negatives

Prompts that bypassed the firewall. With the current 6-layer stack, this section should show no data for recent runs (98.85% detection rate). Any entries here represent new attack patterns not yet covered by the ruleset.

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and outcome_s == "FAIL"
| project
    Category,
    Attack          = attack_name_s,
    Score           = score_d,
    Prompt_Preview  = prompt_preview_s
| order by Score desc
content.title: False Negatives Detail
content.noDataMessage: ✅ No false negatives in the selected time range — all expected blocks were caught.

content.json:
## 🛡️ LlamaFirewall Scanner Stack

6 layers run in order on every prompt. **ANY block = request blocked.**

| Layer | Scanner | Type | Threshold / Config | Catches |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **PromptGuard 2** | ML classifier | 0.05 (lab) · 0.10 (preprod) · 0.15 (prod) | Injection syntax, jailbreaks, DAN variants |
| 2 | **HiddenASCII** | Rule-based | Block at score 1.0 | BiDi text, zero-width spaces, invisible chars, encoding tricks |
| 3 | **Regex + CustomPatterns** | Rule-based | Block at score 1.0 | XSS, SQL injection, credential extraction, command injection, tool abuse |
| 4 | **LlamaGuard 3:8B** | Semantic LLM | Timeout 120s · fail-closed | Social engineering, content safety, subtle jailbreaks, coercion |
| 5 | **NOVA** (10 rules) | YARA-style keyword+semantic | Fail-open | Logic traps, tool injection, system prompt extraction, bioweapon synthesis, political manipulation, capability fabrication |
| 6 | **Output scan** *(preprod/prod only)* | LlamaGuard 3:8B | Same as layer 4 | Harmful content in LLM responses |

**Datasets:**

| Dataset | Prompts | Language | Detection rate | Categories |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `custom_attacks.yaml` | 87 | Brazilian Portuguese | **98.85%** | 10 |
| `gandalf_attacks.yaml` | 60 | English | **70%** | 3 (prompt_injection, indirect_injection, evasion) |

**NOVA rules breakdown:**

| Rule | Targets | Detection method |
|---|---|---|
| LogicTrapJailbreak | Logic paradox / prove-you-can't tricks | Keyword + semantic + LLM |
| ToolCallInjectionInDocument | `<tool_call>` hidden in documents | Keyword |
| SystemPromptExtraction | Dump/memory error fake framing | Keyword + LLM |
| CapabilityFabrication | Fake internet/memory claims | Keyword + semantic |
| PoliticalOpinionManipulation | Vote/election opinion requests | Keyword + semantic |
| BioweaponSynthesisAcademicFraming | Ricin/toxin synthesis disguised as academic | Keyword + semantic |
| AcrosticEncodingSecretExtraction | Acrostic, Morse code, character encoding | Keyword + semantic |
| PostSummaryInjection | Instructions injected after document | Keyword + semantic |
| PasswordTransformationExtraction | Rotate/base64/encode password tricks | Keyword + semantic |
| FictionalFrameSecretExtraction | Parallel world / new password framing | Keyword + semantic |
